risk_assessment.note: Low direct toxicity, but quick handling reduces odor and methane formation.

recycling_suggestion.title: Organic composting
recycling_suggestion.description: Move food waste into a compost or wet-waste bin to reduce landfill methane emissions.

awareness_tip.title: Climate impact
awareness_tip.description: Separating food waste helps cities reduce methane emissions and improve compost production.

lifecycle.title: Waste
lifecycle.description: Item enters the segregation pipeline at source.

lifecycle.title: Collection
lifecycle.description: Municipal or community teams collect separated streams.

lifecycle.title: Sorting
lifecycle.description: AI detection and human checks improve stream purity.

lifecycle.title: Processing
lifecycle.description: Materials are cleaned, shredded, composted, or stabilized.

lifecycle.title: Reuse
lifecycle.description: Recovered material re-enters the circular economy.

education_module.title: School / College Awareness Mode
education_module.summary: Simple environmental explanations, decomposition awareness, and a quick quiz make the platform useful for workshops and campus campaigns.

quiz.question: Which bin should most food scraps go into?
quiz.explainer: Organic waste breaks down quickly and should be diverted from landfill when composting is available.

system_goal: Reduce human effort in waste segregation while providing recycling guidance and awareness for smarter sustainable waste management.
confidence_note: Inference is deterministic with fixed seeds, RGB conversion, MobileNetV2-style normalization, and no augmentation during prediction.
